title: I've created a youtube tutorial for developing Monday.com Apps
excerpt: Hi everyone! I’m excited to share that I’ve created a YouTube channel focused on building monday.com apps. The goal is to help our community grow and to assist everyone in tackling the small tips and tricks that might co…

posts.author: ethanolle1 (Ethan Sayagh)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! I’m excited to share that I’ve created a YouTube channel focused on building monday.com apps. The goal is to help our community grow and to assist everyone in tackling the small tips and tricks that might come up when creating your apps.

It will feature classic dev tutorials where I’ll show you step-by-step how to create different apps.

For now, I only have one video up, but I plan to release one each month.

Enjoy! </3

YouTube

Ethanolle

Share your videos with friends, family, and the world

posts.author: ddogelofa (dodge )
posts.cookedHtml:
That’s awesome! Creating a YouTube tutorial for developing Monday.com apps is a great way to share your knowledge. To maximize your video’s reach, consider using effective titles, engaging thumbnails, and promoting it on social media.

Additionally, exploring free ways to get YouTube views, like collaborating with other creators or engaging with your audience in the comments, can help attract more viewers and grow your channel. Great job on sharing your expertise!

posts.author: cat-mahf (Cat Parker)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome! Do you have any of the videos that have english closed caption on them?
